heading: Stock Price [USD] vs. Volume [mm] with earnings surprise annotations
Stock Price [USD] vs. Volume [mm] with earnings surprise annotations
content: This figure shows a line chart depicting the stock price in USD and volume in millions with annotations for earnings surprises. The x-axis represents time from May 2024 to March 2025, while the left y-axis shows the stock price, and the right y-axis indicates volume in millions. The chart includes annotations for normalized EPS surprises: red triangles for negative surprises in FQ2 2024 and FQ3 2024, and blue triangles for positive surprises in FQ4 2024 and FQ1 2025. The bar graph at the bottom represents trading volume throughout the period.
